name: Textile & Craft Design
student_summary: Design fabrics and revive India's craft traditions for global markets.
overview: Design fabrics and revive India's craft traditions for global markets. Textile & Craft Design sits in the Design family of Arts, Design & Creative Media. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You love making new things and expressing original ideas
You notice the small things others miss
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply weave & print design to real problems
Collaborate with your team using material innovation
Keep improving at craft collaboration — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Primarily on-site — offices, facilities or the field depending on the role
problem_solving_style: Creative — explore, prototype, iterate on ideas
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: A broad Design foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Textile & Craft Design is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A project demonstrating weave & print design
A documented case study of material innovation
projects: Beginner: explore weave & print design with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Textile CAD
smaller_city_scope: Concentrated in bigger hubs today; smaller-city presence is growing slowly.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Fashion Design: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Furniture & Product Design: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Rural Livelihoods & Development: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Textile & Craft Design pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹12 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Art, Home Science. Typical degrees: B.Des Textile (NID/NIFT), Craft-cluster programmes. Alternatives exist: portfolio-first careers without formal degrees.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Textile & Craft Design evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Textile & Craft Design is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
